/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/file_manager_tests.dir/file_manager_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_manager_tests.dir/tests/FileOperationsFacadeTest.cpp.o -o file_manager_tests -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest libfile_manager_core.a -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
